root_cause: ChatInput already supported linked workflow start for non-empty active sessions, but the plus-menu workflow action was gated by !activeSession.workflow. Completed workflow sessions still retain session.workflow, so the Workflows menu item was hidden after completion.

validation_evidence.command: cd desktop; bun run test -- ChatInput.test.tsx -t "opens workflows from the plus menu after the current workflow is completed"
validation_evidence.red_result: failed before production change because the Workflows button was absent from the plus menu
validation_evidence.final_result: passed after production change: 1 test passed, 24 skipped

behavior_surfaces: completed workflow session linked workflow start
residual_risks: No browser/manual visual validation was run; only focused Vitest coverage was executed.
ActiveSession, EmptySession, workflow component, and sessions API surfaces were inspected as live context but not modified.

intentionally_not_checked.reason: This path does not exist in the current checkout; workflow template API calls live in desktop/src/api/sessions.ts.
The task requested the smallest meaningful validation for the touched UI path; focused ChatInput regression covered the changed behavior.
